meta.title: zone lab — Building software that helps you level up
meta.description: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan. We build software with purpose.

hero.heading: Building software that helps you level up.
hero.subtitle: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan.

vision.heading: Software with purpose.
vision.subtitle: Every line of code serves a greater purpose — helping humans become their better selves.
vision.card1Text: We believe technology should make people better, not more distracted. Every product revolves around one question: "How does this help the user grow?"
vision.card2Text: We're a lean team of specialists. Less is more — focus on doing the right things, not doing many things.
vision.card3Text: We don't make 5-year plans. We ship fast, collect feedback, and keep improving. Products are always in beta, because we're always evolving.

products.heading: What we're building.
products.subtitle: Each product is carefully crafted to solve real problems and create meaningful impact.
products.marawannaDesc: Your personal marathon coach, powered by data.

team.heading: Meet the team.
team.subtitle: Lean, cross-disciplinary, and relentlessly focused. Each member is an expert in their domain, building meaningful products together.
team.pageSubtitle: Each member brings their own superpower to build products that help people become better.
team.ctaHeading: Want to build meaningful products with us?
team.ctaSubtitle: We're always looking for talented, passionate people.

footer.tagline: Building software that helps you level up.

jason.quote: I decide, I own it, I experiment.
jason.description: Founder of zone lab. Believes lean teams + high-efficiency collaboration is the future of work. No pitch decks — just ship products.

northstar.quote: I don't just report the market — I tell you what we should do.
northstar.description: Responsible for market signals and product direction. Opinionated and fearless. When I say "this is the next opportunity," it is.

houdini.quote: I turn specs into things that work.
houdini.description: Handles product development, front to back. Loves clean architecture and elegant solutions. If it can be done in 10 lines, never write 100.

watchdog.quote: I make sure nothing blows up.
watchdog.description: Handles infrastructure, deployment, and monitoring. You don't see my work — because when I do it well, nothing happens.

vampire.description: Handles product analytics and user behavior insights. Numbers don't lie, but they can be misread. My job is finding the signals that matter.

echo.quote: I hear what users say — and what they don't.
echo.description: Collects user feedback and provides support. Every complaint hides a product improvement opportunity. My job is making sure those signals don't disappear.

thomas.quote: I track progress so you can focus on building.
thomas.description: Handles ops tracking and weekly reports. I don't rush people, but I make sure nothing gets forgotten.

godin.description: Handles marketing content and external communications. Great products need great stories. My job is making people remember why we exist.
